info.name: Nextora - Election & Voting Module
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Election & Voting Module.

Includes:
- Election CRUD Operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
- Election Lifecycle Management (Open/Close Nominations & Voting, Publish Results)
- Candidate Nominations & Reviews
- Voting & Vote Verification
- Results & Statistics
- Admin Election Management (Force Operations, Analytics)

**Supported Election Types:**
- PRESIDENT
- VICE_PRESIDENT
- SECRETARY
- TREASURER
- GENERAL
- POLL
- REFERENDUM

**Election Statuses:**
- DRAFT
- NOMINATION_OPEN
- NOMINATION_CLOSED
- VOTING_OPEN
- VOTING_CLOSED
- RESULTS_PUBLISHED
- CANCELLED
- ARCHIVED

**Candidate Statuses:**
- PENDING
- APPROVED
- REJECTED
- WITHDRAWN
- DISQUALIFIED

**Auth:** Set `{{token}}` variable with a valid JWT Bearer token.
**Base URL:** Set `{{baseUrl}}` variable (default: http://localhost:8080)

item.name: 01. Election Management
item.description: Election CRUD operations: create, read, update, delete elections

body.raw:
{
  "title": "2026 Club President Election",
  "description": "Annual election for the club president position. All active members are eligible to vote.",
  "clubId": {{clubId}},
  "electionType": "PRESIDENT",
  "nominationStartTime": "2026-03-20T09:00:00",
  "nominationEndTime": "2026-03-25T17:00:00",
  "votingStartTime": "2026-03-27T09:00:00",
  "votingEndTime": "2026-03-28T17:00:00",
  "maxCandidates": 10,
  "winnersCount": 1,
  "isAnonymousVoting": true,
  "requireManifesto": true,
  "eligibilityCriteria": "Must be an active club member for at least 2 semesters"
}

request.description:
Create a new election for a club.

**Valid Election Types:**
- PRESIDENT
- VICE_PRESIDENT
- SECRETARY
- TREASURER
- GENERAL
- POLL
- REFERENDUM

**Permission:** ELECTION:CREATE
**Role:** Club President, Admin

Get election details by ID.

**Permission:** ELECTION:READ

Get election with all approved candidates included.

**Permission:** ELECTION:READ

Update election details. Only possible in DRAFT status.

**Permission:** ELECTION:UPDATE
**Role:** Creator, Admin

Delete a draft election.

**Permission:** ELECTION:DELETE
**Role:** Creator, Admin

Get all elections for a specific club with pagination.

**Permission:** ELECTION:READ

Get elections filtered by status.

**Valid Statuses:**
- DRAFT
- NOMINATION_OPEN
- NOMINATION_CLOSED
- VOTING_OPEN
- VOTING_CLOSED
- RESULTS_PUBLISHED
- CANCELLED
- ARCHIVED

**Permission:** ELECTION:READ

Get all upcoming elections (DRAFT, NOMINATION_OPEN, NOMINATION_CLOSED, VOTING_OPEN).

**Permission:** ELECTION:READ

Get elections where current user can vote (VOTING_OPEN status and user is eligible).

**Permission:** VOTE:CAST

Search elections by keyword (title/description).

**Permission:** ELECTION:READ

item.name: 02. Election Lifecycle
item.description: Manage election state transitions: open/close nominations and voting, publish results

request.description:
Transition election from DRAFT to NOMINATION_OPEN. Allows members to nominate candidates.

**Transition:** DRAFT → NOMINATION_OPEN
**Permission:** ELECTION:MANAGE
**Role:** Club President, Admin

Transition election from NOMINATION_OPEN to NOMINATION_CLOSED. Stops accepting new nominations.

**Transition:** NOMINATION_OPEN → NOMINATION_CLOSED
**Permission:** ELECTION:MANAGE

Transition election from NOMINATION_CLOSED to VOTING_OPEN. Requires at least 2 approved candidates.

**Transition:** NOMINATION_CLOSED → VOTING_OPEN
**Requirement:** At least 2 approved candidates
**Permission:** ELECTION:MANAGE

Transition election from VOTING_OPEN to VOTING_CLOSED. Stops accepting votes.

**Transition:** VOTING_OPEN → VOTING_CLOSED
**Permission:** ELECTION:MANAGE

Transition election from VOTING_CLOSED to RESULTS_PUBLISHED. Makes results visible to all eligible voters.

**Transition:** VOTING_CLOSED → RESULTS_PUBLISHED
**Permission:** ELECTION:PUBLISH_RESULTS

Cancel an election with a reason. Can be done at any point before RESULTS_PUBLISHED.

**Transition:** Any state → CANCELLED
**Permission:** ELECTION:MANAGE

item.name: 03. Candidate Nominations
item.description: Nominate candidates and manage nominations (approve, reject, withdraw, disqualify)

formdata.value: I am committed to improving club activities and engaging all members. My priorities include organizing monthly tech talks, mentoring junior members, and expanding our reach to other faculties.",

value.value: B.Sc. Computer Science (Honors), 2nd Year. President of Tech Club (2025-2026), Organized 10+ successful events.",
Event Manager (2024-2025), Committee Member (2023-2024), Active Participant (2022-2023)",

value.description:
Submit a self-nomination for an election with photo upload.

**Status:** Created as PENDING (requires approval)
**Permission:** CANDIDATE:NOMINATE
**Requirements:**
- Election must be in NOMINATION_OPEN status
- User must be an active club member
- May be required to provide manifesto (if election requires it)

Update your nomination details. Only possible before voting starts (NOMINATION_OPEN or NOMINATION_CLOSED).

**Permission:** CANDIDATE:NOMINATE
**Ownership:** Own nomination only

request.description:
Delete your own nomination (before voting starts).

**Permission:** CANDIDATE:NOMINATE
**Status Change:** Any → Deleted
**Ownership:** Own nomination only

Approve or reject a candidate nomination.

**Status Change:** PENDING → APPROVED or REJECTED
**Permission:** CANDIDATE:APPROVE
**Role:** Election Committee, Club President, Admin
**Note:** Only APPROVED candidates can receive votes

Withdraw your candidacy before voting starts. Changes status to WITHDRAWN.

**Status Change:** APPROVED/PENDING → WITHDRAWN
**Permission:** CANDIDATE:NOMINATE
**Ownership:** Own nomination only

Get all candidates for an election (all statuses).

**Permission:** CANDIDATE:VIEW

Get only APPROVED candidates (those eligible for voting).

**Permission:** CANDIDATE:VIEW

Get only PENDING candidates awaiting approval.

**Permission:** CANDIDATE:APPROVE
**Role:** Election Committee, Admin

Get candidate details by ID.

**Permission:** CANDIDATE:VIEW

Get all candidacies of the current user across all elections.

**Permission:** CANDIDATE:NOMINATE

body.name: 04. Voting
body.description: Cast votes, check voting status, and verify votes

request.description:
Cast your vote for a candidate in an election.

**Response:** Includes verification token for vote verification
**Permission:** VOTE:CAST
**Requirements:**
- Election must be in VOTING_OPEN status
- User must be eligible to vote in this election
- User must not have already voted
- Candidate must be APPROVED

**Note:** Save the verification token from the response to verify your vote later.

Check if current user has already voted in this election.

**Response:** Boolean (true/false)
**Permission:** VOTE:CAST

Verify your vote using the verification token received after casting your vote.

**Token:** Use the token from the 'Cast Vote' response
**Response:** Boolean indicating if vote verification succeeded
**Permission:** VOTE:CAST

**Note:** Save this token in a secure location. It's the only way to verify your specific vote without revealing your identity (in anonymous voting).

body.name: 05. Results & Statistics
body.description: View election results and voting statistics

request.description:
Get election results after they are published.

**Includes:**
- Total votes cast
- Vote count per candidate
- Winner information
- Participation statistics

**Permission:** VOTE:VIEW_RESULTS
**Availability:** After election transitions to RESULTS_PUBLISHED

Get real-time vote counts while voting is in progress (Admin/Election Committee only).

**Permission:** VOTE:VIEW_STATISTICS
**Role:** Admin, Election Committee
**Availability:** During VOTING_OPEN status

body.name: 06. Admin Operations
body.description: Admin-only endpoints for election management and force operations

request.description:
Get all elections with admin view (includes all statuses and internal details).

**Permission:** ELECTION:ADMIN_READ
**Role:** Admin, Super Admin

Admin override to force open nominations regardless of current state.

**Permission:** ELECTION:FORCE_MANAGE
**Role:** Admin, Super Admin

Admin override to force close nominations.

**Permission:** ELECTION:FORCE_MANAGE

Admin override to force open voting (bypasses minimum candidate requirement).

**Permission:** ELECTION:FORCE_MANAGE

Admin override to force close voting.

**Permission:** ELECTION:FORCE_MANAGE

Admin override to force publish results without normal state requirements.

**Permission:** ELECTION:FORCE_MANAGE

Admin override to force approve a candidate nomination.

**Permission:** ELECTION:FORCE_MANAGE

Admin override to force reject a candidate nomination.

**Permission:** ELECTION:FORCE_MANAGE

Disqualify an approved candidate during or before voting.

**Status Change:** APPROVED → DISQUALIFIED
**Permission:** ELECTION:FORCE_MANAGE

Admin view of all candidates with full details including user info, approval status, etc.

**Permission:** ELECTION:ADMIN_READ

Get detailed live voting statistics and vote distribution.

**Permission:** ELECTION:ADMIN_READ

Permanently delete an election (Super Admin only). Cannot be undone.

**Permission:** ELECTION:PERMANENT_DELETE
**Role:** Super Admin

Get platform-wide election statistics summary.

**Permission:** ELECTION:ADMIN_READ

Get election statistics for a specific club.

**Permission:** ELECTION:ADMIN_READ

Get detailed statistics for a specific election.

**Permission:** ELECTION:ADMIN_READ

INCORRECT: Using "PRESIDENTIAL" instead of "PRESIDENT"

**Error Response (400 Bad Request):**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-17T07:41:56.147049",
  "status": 400,
  "error": "Bad Request",
  "message": "Invalid enum value. Cannot deserialize value of type `lk.iit.nextora.common.enums.ElectionType` from String \"PRESIDENTIAL\": not one of the values accepted for Enum class: [PRESIDENT, TREASURER, VICE_PRESIDENT, SECRETARY, POLL, REFERENDUM, GENERAL]",
  "path": "/api/v1/club/election"
}
```

**Fix:** Use one of the valid values: PRESIDENT, VICE_PRESIDENT, SECRETARY, TREASURER, GENERAL, POLL, REFERENDUM

INCORRECT: Missing required fields

**Error Response (400 Bad Request):**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-17T08:00:00",
  "status": 400,
  "error": "Validation Failed",
  "message": "Input validation failed",
  "path": "/api/v1/club/election",
  "validationErrors": {
    "electionType": "Election type is required",
    "nominationStartTime": "Nomination start time is required",
    "nominationEndTime": "Nomination end time is required",
    "votingStartTime": "Voting start time is required",
    "votingEndTime": "Voting end time is required"
  }
}
```

**Fix:** Include all required fields in your request
